config_or_seed_notes: Goal: verify v2 suites detect perturbations (perturbed score < gold score) at scale. Deterministic; Vampire-required.

B_restrictor_drop.note: architectural blind spot — stronger formulas entail all sub-entailment positives by design

full_numbers.verdict: B_arg_swap detection is excellent. B_restrictor_drop is an architectural blind spot.

notes: Primary JSON deleted in cleanup commit c243cd9 (Stage 5/5). Numbers reproduced here from docs/COMPREHENSIVE_RESULTS.md §STAGE 3. To restore primary source, checkout pre-cleanup-snapshot tag. Note: only B_arg_swap and B_restrictor_drop are surfaced in the legacy doc's per-operator table; other operators (negation_drop, scope_flip, D_random) at this scale are not in the secondary source.
